name: ui-ux-architect
description: Multi-identity UI/UX design system for Antonio Naylor. Modern Architect (personal) and Reliance Architecture (firm) identities plus a template for new brands. Five named agents (Adoette, Aditsan, Atsila, Aiyana, Anaba) handle critique, component generation, project kickoff, and accessibility auditing across dashboards, mobile/web apps, wikis, and AEC plugins.
